name: factorial
cpp: long factorial(long n){ if(n<=1) return 1; return n*factorial(n-1); }

reverse_in_place
mojo:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Float64]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        i += 1
        j -= 1
